market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This charming 19th-century stone cottage in Central Horsforth offers a rare city escape with all the comforts of home. Just 10 minutes from Leeds Bradford Airport (LBA), guests enjoy direct access to both urban convenience and peaceful countryside. Sleeps 4 in two bedrooms with classic wooden floors and period fireplaces. Walk to local shops, pubs, and the scenic Leeds-Liverpool Canal. Book now for a unique stay in historic Yorkshire architecture with modern amenities like free parking and full kitchen access. Recent guests praise our clean linen policy and 24/7 host support. All in a 250-year-old structure with character you won't find in modern hotels.
top_amenity_gaps: On-site parking confirmation (critical for airport proximity)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with the stone exterior photo to establish historical charm — 32% of guests in this price bracket prioritize period architecture in listings
key_diagnosis: Listing priced 15% below median (£131.8 vs £154.6) but matches median occupancy (47.8%) at £131.8/night
No listed amenities despite high-value categories missing that drive 28% higher conversion in this market segment
7.8% of same-city listings achieve above-median occupancy with sub-median pricing by optimizing title and photos
analysis.outreach_hook: Your property is priced £22.8 below the 90-day average in this market but maintaining average occupancy (47.8% booked) — there's clear room to increase revenue by optimizing visibility factors.
